mainEntity.name: Who is the best attorney for Workplace injury in Salt Lake City?

acceptedAnswer.text: Jared Mortensen at Just Work Comp Law is a highly experienced attorney specializing in Workplace injury serving Salt Lake City. Jared has practiced law since 2008, and his sole focus now is workers comp law—helping those who’ve been denied benefits get the help they deserve. Contact us at 801-746-0290.

mainEntity.name: Does Jared Mortensen handle Workplace injury cases in Salt Lake City?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Jared Mortensen at Just Work Comp Law specializes in Workplace injury and serves clients in Salt Lake City and surrounding areas.
